name: viral-factory
description: Discover product ideas through viral video analysis. Content-Market Fit before Product-Market Fit.

skills.name: init-from-prd
skills.description: Read a PRD or method document and populate viral-factory.config.yaml with extracted niche, product, and audience context.

skills.name: discover-niche
skills.description: Run the full CMF pipeline: scrape TikTok → score → fan-out analysis → cluster pain → write niche report.

skills.name: decompose-video
skills.description: Break a viral video into hook, structure, format, novelty element. Appends entry to video-templates.md.

skills.name: spec-from-niche
skills.description: Turn a validated niche report into a product spec with positioning, one-demo feature, pricing, and top hooks.

skills.name: recreate-video
skills.description: Apply a proven video template to a product. Generates script + Higgsfield video + virality forecast.

agents.name: video-analyst
agents.description: Fan-out worker: analyzes one video into structured extraction schema.

agents.name: comment-miner
agents.description: Fan-out worker: extracts pain points, hooks, and commercial signals from video comments.
